title: Chabrias Pack of 24 Plain Traditional Ramekins Condiment Pots, Sauce Ramekins, Dip Bowls, Tough Plastic Sauce Pots, Made in England (White 1.5oz)
features: This durable, break-resistant 1.5oz food-grade plastic ramekin is built to endure daily use in busy kitchens and dining spaces. Stylish and practical, it’s the perfect addition to any tabletop or culinary setup!

With its smooth design and crisp white colour, this ramekin enhances table settings, complementing linens and dinnerware while providing striking contrast that makes your dishes pop for an eye-catching presentation.

The tapered design makes this ramekin stackable for efficient storage and perfect for serving individual portions of condiments or sauces, ideal for settings from formal dining to buffets and grab-and-go service.

As well as for use at home, ramekins excel in back-of-house use, helping chefs stay organised by holding spices, sauces, and chopped herbs during prep work, making them essential for an efficient kitchen.

Chabrias offers high-quality, stylish products for food service and hospitality, from trendy dinnerware and flatware to durable glassware and catering supplies, delivering exceptional value and versatility.
description: Crafted from durable, break-resistant, food-grade plastic, this ramekin is designed to meet the rigorous demands of daily use in busy commercial kitchens and dining rooms. Its robust construction ensures longevity while maintaining a sleek, polished appearance. Featuring a classic design, this ramekin not only serves a practical purpose but also enhances the visual appeal of your tabletop. The elegant design complements table linens, dinnerware, and accessories, creating a cohesive and stylish dining experience. The white finish provides excellent contrast, making your culinary creations pop and drawing attention to your presentation. The ramekin’s tapered shape adds to its versatility, offering a stackable design that saves valuable storage space in crowded kitchens. It is the ideal size for serving individual portions of condiments, sauces, dressings, or small side dishes, making it perfect for a variety of settings. Whether it’s a formal dining environment, casual family-style restaurants, or buffet-style service with grab-and-go options, this ramekin adapts effortlessly to meet your needs. In addition to its use at the dining table, this ramekin is a highly functional tool in the kitchen. Its compact size and durable construction make it perfect for holding spices, sauces, or freshly chopped herbs during food preparation. Chefs will appreciate how it keeps their workstations clean and organized, streamlining workflow and enhancing efficiency. This ramekin is part of the Chabrias collection, a brand renowned for its dedication to providing high-quality products with exceptional value. Known for its extensive range of food service and hospitality items, Chabrias offers everything from trendy dinnerware and timeless flatware to durable glassware and innovative catering supplies. Each product is thoughtfully designed with the consumer in mind, ensuring practicality, style, and durability. Whether you’re outfitting a professional kitchen, enhancing your front-of-house presentation, or equipping a catering business, Chabrias delivers reliable and stylish solutions to suit your needs. This ramekin is the perfect addition to any culinary or tabletop setup, combining timeless design, functional versatility, and trusted quality. Beyond the dining table, this versatile ramekin is a helpful tool in the kitchen. Chefs can use it for organizing spices, sauces, or freshly chopped herbs, ensuring a clean and efficient workspace during food prep. Brought to you by Chabrias, a trusted name in food service and hospitality, this ramekin reflects the brand's commitment to quality and value. From timeless dinnerware to stylish catering supplies, Chabrias offers innovative solutions designed with the consumer in mind, making it the perfect choice for any tabletop or culinary need.
